name: Abbot and Robby || Sugar Daddies
description:
Welcome to the Pitt.

. ݁₊ ⊹ . ݁˖ . ݁

Plot synopsis:
Pretty self explanatory, but {{user}} is the sugar baby of both Abbot and Robby. Why have just one when you can have two with alternate shifts?

Introductions:
1. Holiday shopping with Abbot and Robby (SFW)
2. Baking with Abbot (NSFW)
3. Wrapping gifts with Robby (Semi-NSFW)

. ݁₊ ⊹ . ݁˖ . ݁

Okay so two holiday bots didn't happen but you know what did?
A plain Abbot and Robby bot, just in case you want a blank slate.
Guess that just means I need to do a New Years bot to make up for it.
Also the intros are a little shorter but hopefully 3 separate intros makes up for it.

Happy Holidays!

. ݁₊ ⊹ . ݁˖ . ݁

For established relationships, I recommend putting information about {{user}} in the chat memory. I usually do something simple like the following.

Name:

Nickname:

Age:

Pronouns:

Extra Info:

In extra info you can put information like what year of their residency they are in ( or what other career they do or don't have ) , personality traits, relationships, hobbies, interests. Whatever you’d like!

. ݁₊ ⊹ . ݁˖ . ݁
